  594: def score_chunk(chunk: Chunk, var_name: str, query_tokens: set[str], var_tokens: set[str]) -> float:
  595:     low_text = chunk.text.lower()
  596:     score = 0.0
  597:     if re.search(rf"\b{re.escape(var_name.lower())}\b", low_text):
  598:         score += 5.0
  599: 
  600:     overlap = len(chunk.tokens & query_tokens)
  601:     score += overlap * 0.28
  602:     token_overlap = len(chunk.tokens & var_tokens)
  603:     score += token_overlap * 0.9
  604: 
  605:     if any(k in low_text for k in ["default", "init", "initialize", "fallback", "config"]):
  606:         score += 0.8
  607:     if any(k in low_text for k in ["if", "validate", "check", "must", "limit", "quota"]):
  608:         score += 0.7
  609:     if any(k in low_text for k in ["db", "database", "save", "insert", "update", "http", "request", "response", "api"]):
  610:         score += 0.6
  611:     return score

  614: def merge_ranges(ranges: list[tuple[int, int]]) -> list[tuple[int, int]]:
  615:     if not ranges:
  616:         return []
  617:     ranges = sorted(ranges, key=lambda x: (x[0], x[1]))
  618:     out = [ranges[0]]
  619:     for s, e in ranges[1:]:
  620:         ls, le = out[-1]
